channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: us
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: us

item.title: Everyone aboard an American Airlines jet that collided with an Army helicopter is feared dead
item.description: ARLINGTON, Va. (AP) — Everyone aboard an American Airlines jet carrying 60 passengers and four crew members that collided with an Army helicopter was feared dead in what was likely to be the worst U.S. aviation disaster in almost a quarter century, officials said Thursday.
item.dc:creator: LOLITA C. BALDOR, TARA COPP and ERIC TUCKER, Associated Press, KREX 5

item.title: Video captures fiery crash between American Airlines flight and Army Blackhawk
item.description: (NEXSTAR) - Images from the EarthCam video service captured images of what appears to be the fiery crash of an American Airlines jet over the Potomac River Wednesday evening.
item.dc:creator: Bill Disbrow, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Reagan National Airport crash: Military Black Hawk helicopter collides midair with American Airlines jet
item.description: An Army Black Hawk helicopter collided midair with an American Airlines flight from Wichita, Kansas, at Reagan National Airport on Wednesday.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: CVS gives some customers a way to get into locked cabinets
item.description: CVS said the company is testing the ability to let customers open locked display cabinets using the CVS Health app.
item.dc:creator: Alix Martichoux, NewsNation

item.title: Fewer than half in new poll trust Trump, RFK Jr. to make right health recommendations
item.description: The latest KFF survey finds 42 percent of respondents say they have either a great deal or fair amount of trust in Trump to make the right recommendations when it comes to health issues.
item.dc:creator: Sarah Fortinsky, NewsNation

item.title: First independently developed jet breaks the sound barrier over the California desert
item.description: A sleek white aircraft became the first independently developed jet to break the sound barrier Tuesday, tearing through the air tens of thousands of feet above the Mojave Desert and a crowd of delighted onlookers.
item.dc:creator: HALLIE GOLDEN, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Idaho House calls on Supreme Court to undo same-sex marriage ruling
item.description: The Supreme Court does not overturn its previous rulings absent a new case presenting a legal challenge.
item.dc:creator: Ashleigh Fields, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Too little, too late: Residents say they were in the dark as fire spread with no evacuation order
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — When disaster strikes, government emergency alert systems offer a simple promise: Residents will get information about nearby dangers and instructions to help them stay safe.
item.dc:creator: CHRISTOPHER L. KELLER, CLAUDIA LAUER, AMY TAXIN and REBECCA BOONE, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: 2 West Haven police officers shot while executing search warrant in New Haven, suspect dead
item.description: Two West Haven police officers while executing a search warrant early Wednesday morning at an apartment complex in New Haven, and the suspect was fatally shot, according to police.
item.dc:creator: Jenn Brink, NewsNation

item.title: 2025 Grammys to proceed with focus on wildfire relief, here's what to expect
item.description: The 2025 Grammy Awards are right around the corner, which means it is time to get those viewing party plans in action. Allow us to help.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, KTLA 5

item.title: Trump approval rating slips after flurry of executive actions: Survey
item.description: President Trump's approval rating slipped after his first week back in the Oval Office, where he issued a slew of executive orders.
item.dc:creator: The Hill, KRON4

item.title: Capitol Police arrest man with Molotov cocktails attempting to target Johnson, Hegseth, Bessent
item.description: The U.S. Capitol Police arrested a man with Molotov cocktails and knives who was allegedly attempting to kill House Speaker Mike Johnson and President Trump’s two recently confirmed nominees, Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth and Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent.
item.dc:creator: Filip Timotija, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Dolton Mayor Tiffany Henyard involved in board meeting brawl between boyfriend, activist
item.description: Chicago-area "super mayor" Tiffany Henyard jumped into a Thornton Township board meeting fist fight between her boyfriend and an activist who criticized her.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Honda recalls more than 290,000 vehicles over possible engine issue
item.description: An error in the fuel injection electronic control unit could lead to the engine stalling or a loss os power.
item.dc:creator: Joshua Hallenbeck, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Trump’s DOJ could shift key Supreme Court cases
item.description: President Trump’s Justice Department could change the department’s position on critical Supreme Court cases, potentially altering the trajectory of high-profile appeals before the justices.
item.dc:creator: Ella Lee, NewsNation

item.title: Trump makes moves to expand power, sparking chaos, possible constitutional crisis
item.description: Just a little over a week into his second term, President Donald Trump is taking steps to maximize his power, sparking chaos and what critics contend is a constitutional crisis as he challenges the separation of powers that have defined American government for more than 200 years.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: Public confidence in US health agencies declines, survey says
item.description: Trust in health institutions tended to fall along party lines, with Democrats showing greater support.
item.dc:creator: Michael Ramsey, NewsNation

item.title: A$AP Rocky's accuser says he was stunned and furious when his old friend pulled a gun on him
item.description: A$AP Rocky's accuser, former friend and the key witness at his trial testified Tuesday that their relationship had been fraying for years, but he was “furious” and flabbergasted when Rocky pulled a gun on him on the streets of Hollywood.
item.dc:creator: ANDREW DALTON, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Woman arrested at O'Hare with at least $238,000 worth of cocaine in wheelchair
item.description: A woman was arrested at Chicago O'Hare International Airport after being found with at least $238,000 worth of cocaine in her wheelchair.
item.dc:creator: Ethan Illers, NewsNation

item.title: Young people 'inspired' by Trump and Musk, UCLA survey finds
item.description: (KTLA) -- A large number of young people say they are "inspired" by the likes of Elon Musk and Donald Trump and want to be like them, a survey from UCLA found.
item.dc:creator: Travis Schlepp, KRON4

item.title: Largest documented tuberculosis outbreak in US history hits Kansas, officials say
item.description: The Kansas Department of Health and Environment (KDHE) says Kansas is facing the largest documented tuberculosis outbreak in American history.
item.dc:creator: Colter Robinson, WGN 9

item.title: New Homeland Security secretary joins federal agents to tout immigrant arrests in NYC
item.description: Homeland Security Secretary Kristi Noem joined federal agents Tuesday in New York City to announce the arrests of immigrants wanted on criminal charges, including a man accused of kidnapping who was seen on a viral video entering a Colorado apartment with reputed gang members.
item.dc:creator: DAVE COLLINS, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Man stole car to smuggle migrants in trunk past Border Patrol checkpoint
item.description: A 19-year-old from Houston has been sentenced to three and a half years in federal prison for stealing a car that was used for human smuggling at the South Texas border, Acting U.S. Attorney Jennifer Lowery said Tuesday.
item.dc:creator: Sandra Sanchez, Fox 5

item.title: Ousted IG: Trump firings a 'a potentially existential threat' to government oversight
item.description: (The Hill) -- One of 17 government watchdogs ousted by President Trump said that the move was a “a potentially existential threat” to a crucial government oversight tool.
item.dc:creator: Rachel Frazin, KRON4

item.title: Study says climate change made conditions that fed California wildfires more likely, more intense
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — Human-caused climate change increased the likelihood and intensity of the hot, dry and windy conditions that fanned the flames of the recent devastating Southern California wildfires, a scientific study found.
item.dc:creator: SETH BORENSTEIN, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: These are the most romantic restaurants in the US, according to OpenTable
item.description: (NEXSTAR) - Valentine's Day is just around the corner and finding the perfect restaurant to take the one you love can always be challenging.
item.dc:creator: Nick Jachim, Fox 5

item.title: Federal judge temporarily blocks Trump admin's freeze on federal grants, loans
item.description: A federal judge has temporarily blocked a Trump administration freeze on federal grants and loans that could total trillions of dollars.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Watch a miles-long cluster of dolphins captured on drone video
item.description: A miles-long cluster of dolphins has been filmed leaping and gliding across Carmel Bay off the central coast of California, forming an unusual “super pod” of more than 1,500 of the marine creatures.
item.dc:creator: HALLIE GOLDEN, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: A GOP lawsuit to limit people in the US illegally from the census count will be harmful, voters say
item.description: Voters in California and Texas affiliated with a Democratic group want to intervene in a lawsuit filed by four Republican state attorneys general that is attempting to exclude people in the U.S. illegally from numbers used to divvy up congressional seats among states.
item.dc:creator: MIKE SCHNEIDER, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: States lose access to Medicaid payment portal amid Trump federal aid freeze
item.description: State Medicaid programs across the country are reporting they've lost access to federal payment portals one day after President Trump announced a freeze on federal grants and aid.
item.dc:creator: Joseph Choi, WFLA, NBC

item.title: 5 takeaways from the first Trump White House briefing
item.description: President Trump’s press secretary Karoline Leavitt held her first White House briefing Tuesday, fielding questions from reporters for just more than 45 minutes.
item.dc:creator: Alex Gangitano, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Mariano's hosting company-wide hiring event Thursday
item.description: CHICAGO — Mariano's is hosting a company-wide hiring event at all 44 of its locations on Thursday. According to a press release, the supermarket chain will hold in-person interviews from 2 p.m. to 7 p.m for both full-time and part-time jobs.
item.dc:creator: Marisa Rodriguez, WGN 9

item.title: Sean Duffy is confirmed by the Senate to lead the Transportation Department
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Sean Duffy was confirmed Tuesday as transportation secretary, giving him a key role in helping President Donald Trump cut regulations and fix the nation's infrastructure. The former Wisconsin congressman has promised safer Boeing planes, less regulation and help for U.S.
item.dc:creator: BERNARD CONDON, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Coca-Cola launches new Orange Cream flavor
item.description: A year after the launch of the short-lived Coca-Cola Spiced, Coke is adding another new flavor to its lineup.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: A Sundance documentary called ‘The Stringer’ disputes who took AP’s 'napalm girl' photo in Vietnam
item.description: PARK CITY, Utah (AP) — After a half-century of public silence, a freelance photographer from Vietnam has asserted he took one of the most renowned and impactful photos of the 20th century — the image of a naked girl fleeing a napalm attack in South Vietnam that has long been credited to a staff phot
item.dc:creator: LINDSEY BAHR, Associated Press, ABC 4
